title: Session provenance — persist launched app, deep link, artifact path, and proof metadata per command
description:
Persist proof provenance in session history so transcript-backed debugging can answer what app, URL, artifact, and render wait produced a screenshot.

Acceptance criteria:
- session history stores launched app, deep link, screenshot path, and proof metadata
- provenance survives normal monitor writes and session recovery
- menubar/server surfaces can read the last proof metadata when needed
- regression tests verify provenance shape and persistence

context.text: update_provenance() and get_provenance() added. launch/url/screenshot record provenance. Survives writes and recovery. 6 new tests. 344 pass.

acceptanceCriteria: session history stores app, URL, screenshot path, and proof metadata
provenance survives normal writes and recovery
server or UI surfaces can read last proof metadata
